_comment: Metadata for the docs/ manual. The last_synced_commit is the commit at which docs/ was last verified against the implementation; the sync-docs skill (.claude/skills/sync-docs/SKILL.md) diffs HEAD against it and updates this file. Committed to git on purpose so the baseline persists across sessions and machines. A dotfile + .json so a future docs website does not render it as a page.
note: No doc edits needed: the two user-facing features in range — split zoom with cmd+opt+shift+F and per-pane zoom buttons (#435), and Shelf agent status badges + cmd-held trackpad book/tab swiping (#434) — were already documented in their feature PRs (terminal.md, keyboard-shortcuts.md, shelf.md, active-agents.md, settings-fields.md showActiveAgentStatusInShelf row), verified against AppShortcuts.swift and GlobalSettings.swift. Remaining changes are internal fixes (windowless stall diagnostics, Sentry HTTP filtering, detection resync, worktree Advanced field labels). Baseline bump only.
